data.title: Bitcoin Whale Addresses Show Signs of Accumulation in March
data.description: According to PANews, analysis by IntoTheBlock reveals that the balance of Bitcoin whale addresses has been declining over the past year. However, data from March indicates a potential reversal of this trend. As of now, Bitcoin held by whale addresses has increased by approximately 62,000 coins since the beginning of the month, suggesting new signs of accumulation in the market.

data.title: South Korean prosecutors raid Bithumb headquarters to investigate suspected misappropriation of funds to buy a personal apartment for former CEO
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: South Korean prosecutors raided the headquarters of cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb today to investigate allegations that it misappropriated company funds to support the former CEO's purchase of a personal apartment. The case was transferred by the Financial Supervisory Service and is still under investigation.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 1.95% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 20, 2025, 09:07 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.369995 USDT, with a narrowed 1.95% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bedrock Token BR TGE is now available exclusively on Binance Wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bedrock token BR TGE has been exclusively launched on Binance wallet.

data.title: Bakkt Bets Big on Crypto: Leadership Shakeup & Core Focus Strategy
data.description:
Bakkt Holdings appoints Akshay Naheta as co-CEO and refocuses on core crypto services, including stablecoin integration, while streamlining operations.

The post Bakkt Bets Big on Crypto: Leadership Shakeup & Core Focus Strategy first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/20/bakkt-bets-big-on-crypto/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bakkt-bets-big-on-crypto

data.title: Bybit: 89% of stolen $1.4B crypto still traceable post-hack
data.description:
The lion’s share of the hacked Bybit funds is still traceable after the historic cybertheft, as blockchain investigators continue their efforts to freeze and recover these funds.
The crypto industry was rocked by the largest hack in history on Feb. 21, when Bybit lost over $1.4 billion in liquid-staked Ether (stETH), Mantle Staked ETH (mETH) and other digital assets
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bybit-1-4b-hack-88-percent-traceable-lazarus-group?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Data: Whales now hold about 62,000 more Bitcoins than at the beginning of the month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to IntoTheBlock, the balance of Bitcoin whales has been on a downward trend for nearly a year, but data from March suggests a reversal. Whales now hold about 62,000 more Bitcoins than at the beginning of the month, indicating that whales are reaccumulating.

data.title: Binance Implements "Vote-Washing" to Prevent Cheating in Listing Votes
data.description: Binance co-founder He Yi addressed community concerns regarding potential vote manipulation, including vote bribery, in Binance’s newly introduced "Vote to List" mechanism. She stated that Binance will implement "vote-washing" to eliminate fraudulent practices, ensuring a fair and transparent voting process.Key Measures to Maintain Voting IntegrityVote-Washing System: Binance will actively monitor and filter manipulated votes, preventing artificial inflation of support for certain projects.Strict Anti-Cheating Policies: Any evidence of vote-buying, bribery, or coordinated manipulation will result in disqualification.Enhanced Due Diligence: While community voting plays a role, projects must still pass Binance’s compliance and security reviews before listing.Real Community Participation: Binance remains committed to ensuring that only genuine user votes contribute to the final listing decisions.The "Vote to List" mechanism was designed to increase community participation in Binance’s listing process, and He Yi reaffirmed that the exchange will take strict action against any attempts to manipulate the system. Binance will continue refining its processes to uphold transparency, fairness, and user trust in all listing decisions.

data.title: Gate.io has launched SIREN, BID, and BANANAS31 perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io has launched real-time trading of SIREN, BID, and BANANAS31 perpetual contracts (USDT settlement), supporting 1-50x leverage.
